# CQC League Governance Wiki

> Research notes on CQC governance requirements, private healthcare registration patterns, and application to professional Rugby League club medical provision in England.


This file is an index of documentation pages. For all content in a single file, see [CQC League Governance Wiki full docs](https://ajdench.github.io/cqc-league/llms-full.txt).

## Home

- [Home](https://ajdench.github.io/cqc-league/index.md)

## Board and Decisions

- [Board Briefing](https://ajdench.github.io/cqc-league/research/board-briefing.md)
- [Board CQC Response and Outcomes](https://ajdench.github.io/cqc-league/research/board-cqc-response.md)
- [Registration Decision Model](https://ajdench.github.io/cqc-league/research/registration-decision-model.md)
- [CQC Scope Decision Research](https://ajdench.github.io/cqc-league/research/cqc-scope-decision-research.md)
- [Worked Examples](https://ajdench.github.io/cqc-league/research/worked-examples.md)
